hero.badge: EST. ON THE ROUTES OF THE SILK ROAD
hero.lede: Caravans once carried silk, spices, and medicine across continents. Today Zariaspa Trading carries premium medical equipment, healthcare technology, and pharmaceuticals along the same enduring corridors.

bento.intro: From hospital-grade imaging to last-mile pharma — engineered for compliance, speed, and the same provenance that built the original Silk Road.

imaging.title: Medical Equipment
imaging.desc: Procurement and white-glove deployment of MRI, CT, ultrasound, and surgical systems from tier-1 OEMs across Europe and East Asia.

pharma.desc: Validated cold-chain corridors with real-time temperature & GPS provenance.

healthtech.desc: Diagnostics, IoT devices, and hospital information systems integration.

infra.desc: Pharmaceutical-grade storage with 2–8°C and –20°C zones across Kabul, Dubai, and Samarkand hubs.

about.title: Carrying medicine along ancient
about.lede: Zariaspa Trading was founded in Kabul on a simple principle: the corridors that once moved silk and spice between civilizations can move modern medicine just as faithfully — if someone is willing to do the unglamorous work of doing it right.
about.s1p1: We took our name from Zariaspa — the ancient Greek name for the city of Balkh in northern Afghanistan, a key waypoint on the original Silk Road. The name is a reminder that this country has always been a connector of worlds.
about.s1p2: We started by helping a single hospital in Kabul source spare parts for a CT scanner that had been sitting idle for two years. Today we operate across five hubs and forty countries — but the founding principle hasn't moved.
about.s2p1: Provenance matters. Patients deserve genuine equipment with verified chains of custody, not grey-market guesses.
about.s2p2: Logistics is care. A vaccine at 9°C is a vaccine that fails. Cold-chain integrity is not a service line — it is patient safety.
about.s2p3: Geography is opportunity. The same routes that history called difficult, we call our specialty.
about.s3p1: Quietly. Carefully. With paperwork in order. Our partners — hospitals, ministries, NGOs, manufacturers — choose us because we make difficult corridors feel uneventful. That is the highest compliment a logistics partner can receive.

imaging.title: Medical equipment, sourced and
imaging.lede: From bore-magnet MRI suites to mobile ultrasound carts, Zariaspa procures, ships, installs, and services hospital-grade imaging from the world's most trusted OEMs — engineered to land safely at the end of any caravan route.
imaging.s1p1: We partner directly with tier-1 manufacturers in Germany, the Netherlands, Japan, and South Korea — bypassing grey-market channels to ensure every unit arrives with a complete chain of custody, original warranty, and certified service log.
imaging.s1p2: Each acquisition is matched to the receiving hospital's clinical caseload, electrical grid, and biomedical engineering capacity. We don't sell catalogue numbers; we deliver imaging programs.
imaging.s2p1: Crating, customs brokerage, climate-controlled freight, on-site rigging, calibration, acceptance testing, and clinician training — all coordinated by a single Zariaspa project lead from purchase order to first patient scan.
imaging.s2p2: Our typical MRI installation lands in Kabul, Mazar-i-Sharif, or Herat within 90 days of contract signature, with a guaranteed 96-hour service response radius across the country.
imaging.s3p1: Every system is enrolled in our long-term lifecycle program: scheduled preventive maintenance, OEM-certified spares stocked in our Dubai hub, and remote diagnostic support from biomedical engineers fluent in Dari, Pashto, English, and Arabic.

pharma.title: A pharmaceutical supply chain you can
pharma.lede: Vaccines, biologics, oncology drugs, and essential medicines moved through validated 2–8°C and –20°C corridors — every pallet GPS-tracked, every excursion logged, every recipient on the ledger.
pharma.s1p1: Our pharma routes from Frankfurt, Mumbai, and Dubai into Kabul are pre-qualified end-to-end. Every truck, container, and warehouse zone has been thermally mapped and revalidated annually under WHO PQS and EU GDP guidelines.
pharma.s1p2: Pre-conditioned PCM packouts and active reefer containers maintain cargo within ±0.5°C of target — verified by dual NIST-traceable loggers riding alongside every shipment.
pharma.s2p1: Customers receive a live dashboard tracking temperature, humidity, shock, GPS, and door-open events for every pallet. Excursion alerts route to our 24/7 control tower in Kabul within 90 seconds.
pharma.s2p2: On delivery, a tamper-evident digital chain-of-custody report — signed and timestamped — is filed for regulatory audit and ministry release.
pharma.s3p1: Three independent border crossings, two airfreight gateways, and contingency stock pre-positioned in Dubai mean a single closure never stops a delivery. We've kept oncology pipelines flowing through every regional disruption since 2019.

healthtech.title: Healthcare technology, integrated
healthtech.lede: Connected diagnostics, IoT-enabled monitoring, and the EMR backbone that ties them together — implemented by a team that understands both bedside reality and ministry policy.
healthtech.s1p1: Point-of-care analyzers, portable ultrasound, ECG, and connected vital-signs platforms — selected for ruggedness, low power draw, and serviceability in environments that range from tertiary hospitals to provincial clinics.
healthtech.s1p2: Every device ships with cloud or on-premise data sync, configurable to the receiving institution's bandwidth and privacy posture.
healthtech.s2p1: Asset tracking for crash carts and infusion pumps. Cold-room temperature telemetry. Bed-occupancy and oxygen-flow sensors. We deploy the hardware, the gateway, and the dashboards — and we train the biomeds who keep them running.
healthtech.s3p1: From ADT and EMR to LIS, RIS, and PACS — we integrate proven HIS platforms with HL7 / FHIR pipelines that connect imaging, laboratory, pharmacy, and finance into one operational picture.
healthtech.s3p2: Implementations are phased to keep wards live, with multilingual UIs in English, Dari, Pashto, and Arabic.

compliance.title: Regulatory affairs,
compliance.lede: A dedicated regulatory desk that speaks fluent WHO, ISO, GDP, FDA, EMA — and Pashto. Dossiers, registrations, and ministry liaison managed in-house so your shipments clear customs the first time.
compliance.s1p1: Product registrations with the Afghan MoPH, GCC SFDA, and across our partner networks in Central Asia — prepared, submitted, and shepherded to approval by regulatory professionals who know each authority's expectations.
compliance.s1p2: We maintain living dossiers: every variation, renewal, and post-marketing report tracked centrally so nothing lapses.
compliance.s2p1: Our operations are certified to ISO 13485 for medical devices and operate under EU Good Distribution Practice for pharmaceuticals. Internal audits, CAPA cycles, and supplier qualification are all part of standard practice — not an annual scramble.
compliance.s3p1: We handle import permits, free-sale certificates, GS1-coded labelling, and serialization. We refuse business that can't be done cleanly. Provenance, ethics, and patient safety are non-negotiable conditions of every shipment we touch.

infra.title: Cold-chain infrastructure, ready when the
infra.lede: Pharmaceutical-grade warehousing across Kabul, Dubai, and Samarkand — backed by redundant power, 24/7 monitoring, and a fleet of validated reefer trucks ready to roll the moment a manifest is signed.
infra.s1p1: Kabul (3,200 m² of qualified GDP storage), Dubai Healthcare City (a regional consolidation center), and Samarkand (our overland gateway from Central Asia) form a triangle that puts 80% of the patients we serve within 36 hours of inventory.
infra.s1p2: Every hub maintains 2–8°C, –20°C, and ambient zones, plus segregated quarantine and recall areas. All zones are mapped quarterly.
infra.s2p1: N+1 redundant cooling, automatic generator failover within 8 seconds, and 72-hour fuel reserves keep temperature compliance unbroken through any grid event.
infra.s2p2: A dedicated control tower watches every sensor in real time. Anomalies trigger response protocols within 90 seconds — and the duty engineer is on site within 15 minutes.
infra.s3h: A fleet built for the route
infra.s3p1: Reefer trucks calibrated to ±0.5°C. Insulated last-mile vans for provincial deliveries. Pre-conditioned PCM shippers for air freight. The right vessel for every leg, from Frankfurt's tarmac to a clinic in Bamyan.

network.title: A caravan that never
network.lede: Five offices, three cold-chain hubs, and a partner network that touches forty countries — the routes that once carried silk now carry life-saving medicine, every leg watched in real time.
network.s1p1: Kabul HQ — our home and operational nerve center, with 3,200 m² of qualified pharmaceutical storage and a 24/7 control tower watching every shipment in motion.
network.s1p2: Dubai Hub — the regional consolidation point where Frankfurt's freight forwarders, Mumbai's manufacturers, and East Asia's OEMs converge before the final overland leg.
network.s1p3: Istanbul Office — the bridge between European procurement and Central Asian delivery, handling customs preparation and dossier translation.
network.s1p4: Samarkand Liaison — our overland gateway, reviving the original Silk Road as a modern corridor for medical cargo.
network.s1p5: Frankfurt Desk — embedded with European OEMs and freight forwarders to compress lead times by weeks.
network.s2p1: We don't ship — we move along corridors. Each one is pre-qualified, thermally mapped, customs-prepared, and equipped with backup contingencies. When one border slows, traffic flows through another within hours, not days.
network.s3p1: Wherever a shipment is, whoever handles it, the customer talks to one Zariaspa project lead. That accountability is what turns a network into a partner.

standards.title: The seal of trust, earned
standards.lede: WHO, ISO 13485, EU GDP, FDA, EMA, USP, PIC/S, GS1, MoPH, UNICEF Supply — alignment with the bodies whose standards keep medicine safe, and a quality system that earns those alignments anew with every audit.
standards.s1p1: Our quality management system is certified to ISO 13485:2016 across procurement, distribution, installation, and post-market surveillance of medical devices. Internal audits run quarterly; external recertification annually.
standards.s2p1: Every Zariaspa-operated warehouse and route operates under European Good Distribution Practice for human medicinal products. Temperature mapping, deviation management, transport qualification, and supplier audits are continuous, not episodic.
standards.s3p1: We work only with manufacturers whose products carry valid WHO PQS listings, FDA 510(k) / PMA clearances, or CE marking under EU MDR / IVDR — and we maintain active registration with the Afghan MoPH and partner ministries across the region.
standards.s4p1: GS1-compliant barcoding and serialized item identification on every saleable unit, integrated with our chain-of-custody platform. From manufacturer pack to clinic shelf, every box can be traced — and every counterfeit caught.

contact.title: Begin a
contact.lede: Hospitals, ministries, NGOs, and manufacturers — write to us. We answer every inquiry within one business day, in English, Dari, Pashto, or Arabic.
contact.name: YOUR NAME
contact.helpPh: A short note about your project, equipment, or supply needs...
contact.sent: Dispatch received — we'll be in touch

legal.rights: Zariaspa Limited — Carrying medicine along ancient routes.
